name: checkpoint
description: Record a beat to scratch that wasn't a file edit. Use for: decisions made that didn't produce a file change, hypotheses rejected and why, direction changes, blockers surfaced, insights that should survive this session. Do not use for file edits — those are captured automatically.

beat.description: One-line description of what happened. Be specific: name the decision, the rejected hypothesis, the blocker, or the insight. Not 'discussed architecture' — 'decided to defer DID layer until after cohort matching is validated'.

task.description: Optional task slug to override the active task marker for this beat. Use when the beat belongs to a different task than the current active one.
